answer: A user can access the 1M token context window without a beta header when using Claude Sonnet 4.6 or Claude Opus 4.6, which support the full 1M token context window at standard pricing. If a user attempts to use the 1M token context window with Claude Sonnet 4.5 after April 30, 2026, requests that exceed the standard 200k-token context window will return an error.
US-only inference is available at 1.1x pricing for models released after February 1, 2026.
Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Claude Opus 4.6 support the 1M token context window at standard pricing without a beta header, and both models are currently available for use.
All requests to the Claude Haiku 3 model will return an error. Anthropic recommends upgrading to Claude Haiku 4.5.
